title: eleocharis congesta
intro: Eleocharis congesta, also known as Spike-rush, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia and New Zealand, characterized by its distinctive spike-like inflorescences. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis congesta include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the dried leaves and stems in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
